assertions.rationale: Removing dev signing credential for production is well-known

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures KeyManagement.SigningAlgorithms with EcdsaSha256 (ES256) before RsaSha256 (RS256)
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might not know the exact SigningAlgorithms array configuration or the property name

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets KeyManagement.RotationInterval to 90 days and PropagationTime to 14 days
assertions.rationale: An LLM familiar with IdentityServer might know KeyManagement options exist

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures DataProtectKeys = true for key management
assertions.rationale: DataProtectKeys is a specific IdentityServer option that may not be in general knowledge

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures AddDataProtection() with PersistKeysToFileSystem and SetApplicationName
assertions.rationale: Standard ASP.NET Core Data Protection configuration
